wins: Growth in multiple sport dimensions including men's fitness, men's global football, and running footwear
Positive partner feedback on future product pipeline
Double-digit growth in Mercurial, Global Football, and G.T. Series
Strong consumer engagement with new Running campaign
New product pipeline with innovation in running footwear and apparel
risks: Lower than expected unit sales and revenue decline
Soft traffic in NIKE Direct and Greater China
Elevated inventory levels requiring higher promotional activity
Potential impact from East Coast port strike
